gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor faces the screen, points with both hands toward the two groups of objects, and smiles excitedly
a person gestures with open hands to indicate the two groups, tilting the head slightly while inviting thoughts about the total
a tutor steps forward, bringing both hands together as if merging the two groups, while nodding in encouragement
a person shifts weight slightly to the side, raises both arms outward, and maintains eye contact while emphasizing the new single group
a tutor leans in closer, opens both arms invitingly, and moves the hands downward as if counting down to the activity
a person lifts their arms in celebration with each count, stepping lightly from side to side while counting loudly
a tutor claps hands enthusiastically, stepping back slightly while smiling proudly at the students' efforts
a person nods affirmatively and gestures with both hands toward the class, encouraging them to feel proud of their learning
